chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-356 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 23.06.2023 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi advocate for applicant. Respondent No.3 present in person along with minor baby. Ms. Safa Hisbani, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- Minor has been produced but she is acquainted and used to her father. When attempt was made to give her custody to mother, she has started crying uncontrollably. Therefore, it is clear that she is not confined illegally by her father. The application is dismissed. However, applicant is at liberty to move application before the family court for seeking her custody in accordance with law. JUDGE Ali Haider
